name: NewsRiver Global Intelligence
description: Real-time global news intelligence via NewsRiver API — search, filter, and analyze news across sources with x402 USDC micropayment model.
review: Real-time news intelligence with strong usefulness for research workflows. x402 micropayment model enables pay-per-query access. Version mismatch between ClawHub and repo is cosmetic.
notes: ⚠️ Uses x402 USDC micropayments — agents will spend real cryptocurrency per API call. Review cost model before deploying in automated workflows.
